description: Red and grey rucksack, has a detachable and adjustable hood with a concealed zip pocketOne haul loop, heavily padded adjustable shoulder straps with click clasps, has haul loops at the bottom, sternum straps for balanced weight distributionOne main compartment with a drawstring fastening, has an inner concealed zip pocketOne external zip pocket on the frontA mesh stash pocket on either sidePadded backHeight adjustable hood that helps in controlling the capacity of the bagAdjustable back system for better fit on all torso sizesTorso fit back system for enhanced body comfort and reduced perspiration, has a built-in rain cover at the baseWarranty: 18 months from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectsDisclaimer: Please note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: Thenbsp;innernbsp;liningnbsp;material/colour may vary from what is shown in the imageWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
